notes.text: Temperature alarms triggered twice in the last 20 minutes.
Generator shut down for 90 seconds, then auto-recovered.
Site cooling fan sounds abnormal and load remains elevated.
Maintenance lead requested triage summary before dispatch.

analysis.summary: Generator overheating at remote site at North Ridge Substation remains open. Connectivity is intermittent; latest field signal: Maintenance lead requested triage summary before dispatch.
analysis.severityRationale: The incident indicates unstable operations or signs of imminent equipment failure, so rapid escalation is justified.
escalationTriggers: Repeated alarms or another automatic shutdown
Evidence of rising load or abnormal cooling behavior
Any new safety exposure for onsite personnel
informationNeeds: Latest field verification from the asset owner
Confirmation of whether the condition is stable, improving, or worsening
blockers: Unreliable connectivity may delay remote review or attachment upload
nextActions: Reduce operational load until inspection is completed
Capture one more timestamped field update to reduce uncertainty
Send the fresh incident brief to the next responsible team
Confirm an owner for the next operational checkpoint

title: Water ingress detected in storage room

notes.text: Moisture sensor triggered near electrical cabinet wall.
No active leak visible, but floor edge is wet over ~1.5 meters.
Requested inspection of roof seal and temporary isolation of nearby equipment.

analysis.summary: Water ingress detected in storage room at South Depot B remains monitoring. Connectivity is offline-first; latest field signal: Requested inspection of roof seal and temporary isolation of nearby equipment.
